LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall.label: Phantom Wall
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall.description: A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWallBase.label: Phantom Wall (Home)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWallBase.description: A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.\n\nPrevents enemies, visitors, and prisoners.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Power.label: Phantom Wall (Home) (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Power.description:
A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Prevents enemies, visitors, and prisoners.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_PowerLight.label: Phantom Wall (Home) (Self-Luminous With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_PowerLight.description:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops enemies, visitors, prisoners.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_.label: Phantom Wall (Outdoor)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_.description: A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_Power.label: Phantom Wall (Outdoor) (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_Power.description:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops enemies, visitors, prisoners.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_PowerLight.label: Phantom Wall (Outdoor) (Self-Luminous With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_PowerLight.descripti:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops enemies, visitors, prisoners.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
